page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: PacBio genomic consensus and variant caller for RSII and Sequel
page_metadata.biotools__summary: The GenomicConsensus package provides the variantCaller tool, which allows you to apply the Quiver or Arrow algorithm to mapped PacBio reads to get consensus and variant calls.
page_metadata.galaxy__summary: Compute genomic consensus and call variants using PacBio reads mapped to a reference
page_metadata.galaxy__bio_tools_summary: The GenomicConsensus package provides the variantCaller tool, which allows you to apply the Quiver or Arrow algorithm to mapped PacBio reads to get consensus and variant calls.
